raw_text:
Vertex Data Systems

Intern Backend Engineer

LOCATION

San Francisco, CA (Remote-
friendly)

TYPE

Internship

COMPENSATION

$25-28/hour

TECH STACK

Python

Go

PostgreSQL

Redis

Docker

Kubernetes

RabbitMQ

REST APIs

Git

gRPC

About Vertex Data Systems: Vertex Data Systems is a growth-
stage startup building scalable, cloud-native backend
infrastructure for enterprises. Founded in 2021, we help
companies process and manage massive data streams with sub-
millisecond latency. Our platform is trusted by financial services

firms, e-commerce platforms, and SaaS companies to power their
mission-critical applications.

Join Vertex Data Systems as an Intern Backend Engineer and
gain hands-on experience building scalable distributed systems.
You'll work alongside senior engineers to develop microservices,

optimize database queries, and implement REST APIs. This is an
excellent opportunity to learn modern backend development
practices, contribute to real-world production systems, and build a
strong foundation in systems design and cloud architecture.

RESPONSIBILITIES

Assist in designing and implementing new REST API endpoints
using Python and Go microservices

Write and maintain unit tests and integration tests for backend
services to ensure code quality

Optimize database queries in PostgreSQL and MySQL by
analyzing execution plans and improving indexing strategies

Participate in code reviews and learn best practices from
experienced engineers

Debug and troubleshoot issues in staging and production
environments under mentorship

Document API specifications, architecture decisions, and
implementation details for team knowledge sharing

Collaborate with the infrastructure team to deploy services to
Kubernetes clusters and monitor application performance

Contribute to improving CI/CD pipelines and tooling to
streamline the development workflow

REQUIREMENTS

Currently pursuing a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science,
Software Engineering, or related field (or recent graduate
within 6 months)

Strong foundation in at least one programming language
(Python, Java, Go, or Rust)

Powering real-time data infrastructurefor the next generation of applications Understanding of relational databases and SQL fundamentals

Basic knowledge of HTTP, REST APIs, and asynchronous
programming concepts

Familiarity with version control systems (Git) and collaborative
development workflows

BONUS POINTS

Experience building simple REST APIs or web services in a
previous internship or academic project

Basic understanding of microservices architecture and
distributed systems concepts

Exposure to containerization tools like Docker or container
orchestration platforms like Kubernetes

Familiarity with message queues (Kafka or RabbitMQ) or
event-driven architecture patterns

BENEFITS

Mentorship from experienced senior engineers and architects

Flexible work schedule and remote-friendly environment

Free catered lunches and office snacks (SF office)

Professional development stipend ($500/semester) for
courses, certifications, or conferences

Comprehensive health insurance coverage (medical, dental,
vision)

Opportunity for full-time conversion to junior backend engineer
role upon successful completion

APPLY

Submit your resume, cover letter, and a link to your GitHub profile
(or portfolio) via our careers page at
careers.vertexdata.io/backend-intern. We review applications on
a rolling basis. Selected candidates will participate in a technical
phone screen followed by a take-home coding challenge and final
team interviews.
